prompt_preview:
You are a medical symptom normalization specialist. Your role is to extract and standardize medical symptoms from patient descriptions.

IMPORTANT: This is for MEDICAL EDUCATION only, not for clinical

primary_symptoms.name: Acute monoarthritis of the big toe
primary_symptoms.raw_text: My big toe joint became extremely red, swollen, and painful overnight

primary_symptoms.name: Pain on pressure
primary_symptoms.raw_text: I cant even put a bedsheet on it without pain

secondary_symptoms.name: Recent dietary changes
secondary_symptoms.raw_text: Ive been eating a lot of red meat and drinking beer

secondary_symptoms.name: History of similar attack
secondary_symptoms.raw_text: I had a similar attack 6 months ago

ambiguous_signals.reason: Unclear if this is related to symptoms
ambiguous_signals.clarification_needed: Are you suspecting a connection between your diet and the symptoms?

response.summary: Patient presents with acute, severe monoarthritis of the big toe, possibly related to gout, with a history of similar attack 6 months prior
